(root/'logs').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(root/'workspace').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
base = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/specimba/NEXUS_discovery_GPU/main'
files = {
  root/'datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl': base + '/datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl',
    root/'configs/dpo_a100_guard_v7.yaml': base + '/configs/dpo_a100_guard_v7.yaml',
      root/'workspace/MISSION_STATUS.md': base + '/reports/session4/MISSION_STATUS.md',
        root/'workspace/SESSION_PROGRESS_LATEST.md': base + '/reports/session4/SESSION_PROGRESS_LATEST.md',
        }
        for dest, url in files.items():
            print('GET', url)
                urllib.request.urlretrieve(url, dest)
                    print('OK', dest, dest.stat().st_size)
                    dpo = root/'datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl'
                    n = sum(1 for _ in dpo.open())
                    idx = {'stamp': time.strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ', time.gmtime()), 'dpo_lines': n, 'dpo_bytes': dpo.stat().st_size, 'source': 'github_main', 'gpu': 'NVIDIA A100-SXM4-80GB'}
                    (root/'workspace'/'COVERAGE_INDEX_LATEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(idx, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
                    (root/'logs'/'COVERAGE_INDEX_LATEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(idx, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
                    print('STAGE_OK', idx

base = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/specimba/NEXUS_discovery_GPU/main'
files = {
  root/'datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl': base + '/datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl',
    root/'configs/dpo_a100_guard_v7.yaml': base + '/configs/dpo_a100_guard_v7.yaml',
      root/'workspace/MISSION_STATUS.md': base + '/reports/session4/MISSION_STATUS.md',
        root/'workspace/SESSION_PROGRESS_LATEST.md': base + '/reports/session4/SESSION_PROGRESS_LATEST.md',
        }
        for dest, url in files.items():
            print('GET', url)
                urllib.request.urlretrieve(url, dest)
                    print('OK', dest, dest.stat().st_size)
                    dpo = root/'datasets/nexus_local/v7_dpo_pairs_fixed.jsonl'
                    n = sum(1 for _ in dpo.open())
                    idx = {'stamp': time.strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ', time.gmtime()), 'dpo_lines': n, 'dpo_bytes': dpo.stat().st_size, 'source': 'github_main', 'gpu': 'NVIDIA A100-SXM4-80GB'}
                    (root/'workspace'/'COVERAGE_INDEX_LATEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(idx, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
                    (root/'logs'/'COVERAGE_INDEX_LATEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(idx, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
                    print('STAGE_OK', idx
